content.en:
Entering this independent space, Ye Tian's copying talent covered here and found at least a million or more half-step domain ancestors.

"There are so many half-step domain ancestors in an independent space here, how many half-step domain ancestors are there in the entire Battle Realm Tower?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He knew that he had completely underestimated the number of half-step domain ancestors here before, thinking that the half-step domain ancestors on the other side of the fighting platform were just all, but he didn't expect that it was just the tip of the iceberg.

"First of all, I would like to formally introduce that I am a saint from the Zhenyuan Holy Land in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain!"

Mingyu Daozu introduced himself.

"Zhenyuan Holy Land?"

Ye Tian had never heard of this force, and he didn't know much about the strength of this force at all.

In fact, he hadn't heard of a few forces in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and he knew very little about the situation there.

"It's normal for the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors not to understand, let me introduce the strength of our Zhenyuan Holy Land, our Zhenyuan Holy Land has several invincible domain ancestors, many supreme domain ancestors, as well as a large number of top domain ancestors, elite domain ancestors and ordinary domain ancestors, and even hundreds of thousands of half-step domain ancestors, as well as hundreds of millions of Dao ancestors! As for the creatures under the Dao ancestors, our Zhenyuan Holy Land does not. The entry standard of our Holy Land is Dao Ancestor, and if the strength is not as strong as Dao Ancestor, we don't even have a chance to survive in the Dark Forbidden Domain!"

"So powerful!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

At present, the Dao Mountain Realm does not have a single domain ancestor, and the Divine Heaven Realm Domain was already very powerful in his previous opinion, but the top domain ancestor of the Divine Heaven Realm can be called the top combat power.

There wasn't even a single Supreme Domain Ancestor, but I didn't expect that a Zhenyuan Holy Land in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain would have a large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Wouldn't it mean that the Zhenyuan Holy Land could casually send a Supreme Domain Ancestor to sweep through the Divine Heaven Realm?

"No wonder the people in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain look down on the cultivators of the Realm, the gap between the two sides is too big, for the forces of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Realm is a small place, an ant-like place, if I hadn't entered the list of the Ten Thousand Realms, I'm afraid the Mingyu Dao Ancestor wouldn't have looked down on me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Is the Zhenyuan Holy Land the strongest force in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

Mingyu Daozu was embarrassed for a moment, and then spoke: "Naturally not, the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain refers to an area with incomparably rich resources, which can be regarded as the most prosperous area of the Dark Forbidden Domain, so it is called the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain by the people of the realm. In fact, most of us call this area the Dark Sanctuary! In the Dark Sanctuary, there are ten Supreme Holy Gates, seventy-two holy places, thousands of sects, and hundreds of thousands of giant cities. Even any giant city can easily sweep through countless realms. Basically, a strong person who can establish a giant city in the Dark Sanctuary must have the strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, otherwise he is not qualified to build a city at all!"

"The Dark Sanctuary is so powerful!!

Ye Tian was completely shocked.

Ten Supreme Holy Gates, Seventy-two Holy Lands, Thousands of Sects, and Hundreds of Thousands of Giant Cities, what a terrifying power this is, even the weakest Giant City can sweep through the Divine Heaven Realm, let alone compare with such a weak realm as the Dao Mountain Realm.

Then.

Mingyu Dao Ancestor was surprised: "There are so many forces in the Dark Sacred Domain, and there are hundreds of millions of half-step domain ancestors, although not all of the half-step domain ancestors have entered the Battle Realm Tower, but at least they have also entered four or five percent, and among so many Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors, there are only 1,000 people who can enter the list of all things realm half-step domain ancestors, you can imagine how terrible the competition is, every genius who enters the Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors is such a demon, almost all of them come from the major holy lands and the ten holy gates." But you, a half-step domain ancestor of a mere realm, have broken into the list of all things. You know how incredible you are now, right?"

"I see!"

Ye Tian didn't expect to cause such a sensation all of a sudden, but he wasn't afraid of anything.

He is in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and in the Battle Realm Tower, he should not be able to die, is it possible that those people can still go to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm?

"Mingyu Dao Ancestor, there shouldn't be anyone dead in the Battle Realm Tower, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hahaha, naturally you can't die!" Mingyu Daozu chuckled: "Don't worry, the Battle Realm Tower is the holy relic of the Battle Gate, one of the ten holy gates, and the War Realm Tower is very special, it will not kill people, it will only protect people, otherwise the major forces will not dare to enter the War Realm Tower!"

"Mingyu Dao Ancestor wants to recruit me for the Zhenyuan Holy Land, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, I wonder if you're interested?"

Mingyu Daozu asked.

"This ......"

Ye Tian hesitated.

If he was just a Ten Thousand Things Realm genius on the Ten Thousand Things List, he would probably join the Zhenyuan Holy Land.

But the key is that he thinks that his future achievements far surpass those so-called geniuses of the All Things List, and there are better forces, why does he have to join the Zhenyuan Holy Land?

What he wanted to join more was the Ten Holy Gates!

After pondering for a while, Ye Tian said, "Mingyu Dao Ancestor, thank you for telling me so much information, but I want to join the Ten Holy Gates!"

"You want to join the !!! of the Ten Holy Gates"

Mingyu Daozu was not angry, but was surprised.

The Ten Holy Gates seem to be only one level higher than the Holy Land, but the strength is too great!

Any of the Ten Holy Gates can easily destroy a Holy Land, and even if all the Holy Lands are combined, they can't defeat a Holy Gate.

"The Ten Holy Gates are not easy to enter, and they have a high threshold for external recruitment. For example, the genius of the list of everything, the genius of the general list of everything, they can't look down on it at all. The cultivation speed of the geniuses of the Ten Thousand Things List is very fast, and they can't stay long at the level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm. Therefore, the list of all things is updated more frequently, and there are too many geniuses in the list of all things in the major holy places and holy gates. If you want to join the Ten Holy Gates, you must get the top three places in a certain period of the All Things List, or other special potentials, to have the opportunity to join the Ten Holy Gates. But this is too difficult, and you are only currently more than 900 on the list of all things!"

Mingyu Daozu explained.

The meaning of what she said was very clear, that is, to tell Ye Tian that you would not be able to enter the Ten Holy Gates.

Who didn't want to enter the Ten Holy Gates, she also wanted to enter the Ten Holy Gates, but she was not qualified, so she could only choose to join the Zhenyuan Holy Land.

However, no matter what she said, Ye Tian made it clear that he would not join the Zhenyuan Holy Land for the time being, and would try to join the Ten Great Holy Gates.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, if you can't join the Holy Gate, then choose our Zhenyuan Holy Land!"

Mingyu Daozu said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

I have to say that Mingyu Daozu's attitude is really good, if it were someone else, I'm afraid he would have been angry a long time ago!
